channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Colorado State women's volleyball coach praises team after win over squad with trans player
item.description: Colorado State women's volleyball coach Emily Kohan praised her team for defeating San Jose State in the Mountain West Tournament, which was under a shroud of controversy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mighty Mariners: Moreau Catholic defense sparks thrilling NCS Division VII championship victory
item.description: 2024 NCS Division VII football championship: Moreau Catholic senior Eriq Fields forces and recovers late Ferndale fumble in 21-19 victory.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Ryggs Johnston wins Australian Open for first title. Jiyai Shin wins women's event
item.description: Unheralded American Ryggs Johnston has won his first professional title by claiming the Australian Open by three stokes, while South Korea’s Jiyai Shin claimed her second Women’s Australian Open which was played concurrently at two courses on the famed Melbourne sand belt.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Mikaela Shiffrin suffers abrasion on hip during crash on final run of World Cup giant slalom
item.description: KILLINGTON, Vt. (AP) — American skier Mikaela Shiffrin said she suffered an abrasion on her left hip and that something “stabbed” her when she crashed during her second run of a World Cup giant slalom race Saturday, doing a flip and sliding into the protective fencing.
item.dc:creator: PEGGY SHINN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Andrew Luck returns to Stanford as the GM of the football program
item.description: STANFORD, Calif. (AP) — Andrew Luck is returning to Stanford in hopes of turning around a struggling football program that he once helped become a national power.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Georgia pulls out epic win in 8-overtime thriller, all but clinch spot in College Football Playoff
item.description: Georgia overcame a 14-point deficit with 5:37 left and defeated Georgia Tech in eight overtimes to all but clinch a spot in the College Football Playoff.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chiefs recover botched snap by Raiders in closing seconds, clinch playoff berth with 19-17 victory
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — The Kansas City Chiefs have made a habit of winning games in the most improbable of ways. The way they beat the Raiders on Friday still had Patrick Mahomes and Co. shaking their heads in disbelief.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Colorado State advances to MW volleyball final and will take the court against San Jose State
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Colorado State coach Emily Kohan said her team will take the floor rather than become the latest team to forfeit against San Jose State after the top-seeded Rams advanced to the Mountain West volleyball tournament final on Friday.
item.dc:creator: MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Alabama A&M player Medrick Burnett Jr. dies following injury during game
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (WIAT) — Medrick Burnett Jr., a 20-year-old football player for Alabama A&M University, died Wednesday a month after sustaining a serious injury during a football game. Burnett Jr., a linebacker who was injured during the Magic City Classic on Oct.
item.dc:creator: Drew Taylor, WGN 9

item.title: Judge tosses suit to block trans athlete from NCAA women's tourney
item.description: The judge also noted in his ruling that "no defendant disputed that San Jose State rosters a trans woman volleyball player.
item.dc:creator: Rich McHugh, NewsNation

item.title: Sergachev scores in overtime in 3-2 Utah HC win
item.description: MONTREAL (ABC4 Sports) - Mikhail Sergachev scored with 27 seconds remaining in overtime to give the Utah Hockey Club a 3-2 win against the Montreal Canadiens at Bell Centre on Tuesday. Sergachev directed a Nick Schmaltz pass through the crease inside the left post.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU needs some help to reach Big 12 Championship Game
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After a 9-0 start, it appeared as though BYU was destined for the Big 12 Championship Game. But now, they need some help.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Column: As offense ascends, Bears defense goes on sneaky decline under Matt Eberflus
item.description: The Chicago Bears' defense has been struggling to stop opposing offenses, resulting in a five-game losing streak, while the offense has been unable to score enough points to win games.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Formula 1 expands grid to add General Motors' Cadillac brand and new American team for 2026 season
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Formula 1 on Monday at last said it will expand its grid in 2026 to make room for an American team that is partnered with General Motors. “As the pinnacle of motorsports, F1 demands boundary-pushing innovation and excellence.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Maverick McNealy birdies the last hole at Sea Island to finally become PGA Tour winner
item.description: Maverick McNealy has learned in his five years on the PGA Tour that trying to win a tournament is “designed to make you feel as uncomfortable as you possibly can.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: St. Louis Blues fire Drew Bannister and hire Jim Montgomery as coach
item.description: Drew Bannister is out as coach of the St. Louis Blues after less than a full calendar year on the job. Jim Montgomery is back behind the bench of an NHL team five days after he was fired by the Boston Bruins.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, Fox 5
